title: Beauty and the Bandit
writer: Charles Belden, Gilbert Roland, O. Henry
actors: Gilbert Roland, Martin Garralaga, Frank Yaconelli
plot: In Old California, a young Frenchman transporting a chest full of silver travels by stagecoach to San Marino, to complete a complex business deal. The stagecoach is ambushed by a band of men whose leader, a mysterious bandido know...
